view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for automatic link generation at booking confirmation is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for automatic link generation at booking confirmation is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided in the linked use case explicitly describes the automatic creation of a unique Zoom meeting link upon booking confirmation. The scenario details that the system generates a link and includes it in the confirmation email, which directly addresses the requirement. This is further supported by the successful booking evidence, confirming that the integration and functionality are operational as expected.
